programs.title: Bargain Hunt
programs.desc: Charlie Ross travels to Shrewsbury in Shropshire, where Tim Weeks and Ben Cooper provide expert help as the red and blue teams compete to see who can make the most profit at auction. Charlie goes round the fair quizzing members of the public on a rather unusual antique he has brought along.

programs.title: Harry's Practice
programs.desc: Join Dr Harry Cooper and Dr Katrina Warren for everything you need to know about animals.

programs.title: Medical Rookies
programs.desc: Rookie surgeon Mary operates on a trauma patient critically injured when a tree fell on his car. She must stop his internal bleeding or he could die on the operating table. Hosted by Jennifer Keyte.

programs.title: Better Homes And Gardens
programs.desc: Joh and Ed go on a Snowy Mountains road trip. Graham gets a tour of Green Camel, Australia's largest organic glass house garden facility. Dr Harry and James show off the latest in dog toys.

programs.title: Million Dollar Minute
programs.desc: Million Dollar Minute is a battle of general knowledge, where every correct answer is a step closer to the ultimate test: Can one person, in one minute, win one million dollars?
